channel.title: Bike Tech on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in Bike Tech on Mizubikes

item.title: Specialized Tarmac SL9 Is Official: Here's What Actually Changed
item.description: Specialized has officially launched the S-Works Tarmac SL9, calling it the fastest road bike it's ever made. Here's what's real, what's marketing, and how it stacks up against the SL8.

item.title: Specialized Tarmac SL9: What the Leaks Actually Show
item.description: Leaked images and video of the Specialized Tarmac SL9 have been spreading since May. Here's what the spy shots actually tell us — and what they don't.

item.title: The Factory Always Wins: Why XDS Selling Its Own Bikes Isn't New — It's Just Giant's Playbook
item.description: XDS making bikes for the industry and then selling its own is raising eyebrows. But this story is as old as the bike industry itself — and Giant wrote the original.

item.title: XDS X-Lab: The Chinese Brand Racing in the WorldTour (And Now Selling to You)
item.description: XDS just launched X-Lab globally with nine bikes, including the AD9 WorldTour racer. Here's what they offer, what they cost, and whether they're worth your attention.
